message:
fix(journal,mvcc): harden malformed descriptor handling and add structured decompression error logging

- Update adversarial_descriptor_with_zero_tags test expectations: replay
  now treats all-zero descriptor tags as malformed and stops scanning
  before staging any writes, yielding 0 tags instead of the previous 62
- Add replay_jbd2_malformed_descriptor_with_commit_is_discarded test
  verifying that a descriptor with all SAME_UUID flags but no valid tags
  is correctly discarded even when a commit block follows
- Add structured tracing::error logs to zstd and brotli decompression
  failure paths in MVCC resolve_data_with, emitting compressed_len,
  index, and error details for post-mortem diagnosis instead of silently
  returning None

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
